mapper.select: SELECT b.booking_id AS bookingId, u.name AS userName, p.product_name AS productName, b.created_at AS bookingDate, s.code_contents AS statusName, b.status AS status FROM booking b JOIN user01 u ON b.user_id = u.user_id JOIN product_schedule ps ON b.schedule_id = ps.schedule_id JOIN travel_product p ON ps.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN status_type s ON s.bcode = 200 AND b.status = s.mcode ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT travel_product_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO travel_product ( product_id, region_id, theme_code, product_name, description, price, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{regionId}, #{themeCode}, #{productName}, #{description}, #{price}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO product_schedule ( schedule_id, product_id, title, content, start_date, end_date, status, max_headcount ) VALUES ( product_schedule_seq.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{status}, #{maxHeadcount} )
INSERT INTO product_image ( image_id, product_id, image_name, img_order ) VALUES ( product_image_seq.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, #{imageName}, #{imgOrder} )
mapper.update: UPDATE travel_product SET region_id = #{regionId}, theme_code = #{themeCode}, product_name = #{productName}, description = #{description}, price = #{price}, mod_date = SYSDATE WHERE product_id = #{productId}

MERGE INTO product_image pi USING ( SELECT #{productId} AS product_id, #{imgOrder} AS img_order FROM dual ) src ON ( pi.product_id = src.product_id AND pi.img_order = src.img_order ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET pi.image_name = #{imageName} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( image_id, product_id, image_name, img_order ) VALUES ( product_image_seq.NEXTVAL, #{productId}, #{imageName}, #{imgOrder} )
mapper.select: SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.region_id AS regionId, p.theme_code AS themeCode, p.product_name AS productName, p.description AS description, p.price AS price, pi.image_name AS imageName FROM travel_product p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.product_id = pi.product_id AND pi.img_order = 1 ORDER BY p.product_id DESC

SELECT p.product_id AS productId, p.region_id AS regionId, p.theme_code AS themeCode, p.product_name AS productName, p.description AS description, p.price AS price, pi.image_name AS imageName FROM travel_product p LEFT JOIN product_image pi ON p.product_id = pi.product_id AND pi.img_order = 1 WHERE p.product_id = #{productId}

SELECT schedule_id AS scheduleId, product_id AS productId, title AS title, content AS content, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, max_headcount AS maxHeadcount, status AS status FROM product_schedule WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY start_date ASC, schedule_id ASC
SELECT bcode AS bcode, mcode AS mcode, code_contents AS codeContents FROM status_type WHERE bcode = 510 AND mcode != 999 ORDER BY mcode
SELECT theme_code AS themeCode, theme_name AS themeName FROM theme ORDER BY theme_code
